title: Verify Kody pipeline for low-complexity utility task
description: Meta-task to verify @kody correctly creates a 4-stage pipeline and PR for a low-complexity utility addition. The task requests adding formatDate to src/utils/dateUtils.ts with JSDoc and unit tests. The feature already exists at src/utils/format-date.ts with full implementation. This chore validates Kody Engine's pipeline behavior on complexity=LOW tasks, checking that all 4 stages run and a PR is created.
existing_patterns: src/utils/format-date.ts — existing Intl.DateTimeFormat-based utility with JSDoc and FormatDateOptions interface, covers the same formatting capability
